Class IPACodes

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.social.linguistics.IPACodes
public class IPACodes extends Object
The IPACodes class defines useful constants to use the International Phonetic Alphabet.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot

    static final String
    UNICODE025A
    public final static String UNICODE0344 = "labial spreading"; public final static String UNICODE = "strong articulation"; public final static String UNICODE = "denasal"; public final static String UNICODE033D = "dentolabial"; public final static String UNICODE0340 = "weak articulation"; public final static String UNICODE = "nasal escape"; public final static String UNICODE = "interdental/bidental"; public final static String UNICODE = "reiterated articulation"; public final static String UNICODE02A9 = "velopharyngeal friction"; public final static String UNICODE = "alveolar"; public final static String UNICODE0345 = "whistled articulation"; public final static String UNICODE = "ingressive airflow"; public final static String UNICODE = "linguolabial"; public final static String UNICODE0363 = "sliding articulation"; public final static String UNICODE = "egressive airflow";

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    isIPA(int i)
    Checks if the given character code corresponds to an IPA symbol defined in this class.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • UNICODE025A

      public static final String UNICODE025A
      public final static String UNICODE0344 = "labial spreading"; public final static String UNICODE = "strong articulation"; public final static String UNICODE = "denasal"; public final static String UNICODE033D = "dentolabial"; public final static String UNICODE0340 = "weak articulation"; public final static String UNICODE = "nasal escape"; public final static String UNICODE = "interdental/bidental"; public final static String UNICODE = "reiterated articulation"; public final static String UNICODE02A9 = "velopharyngeal friction"; public final static String UNICODE = "alveolar"; public final static String UNICODE0345 = "whistled articulation"; public final static String UNICODE = "ingressive airflow"; public final static String UNICODE = "linguolabial"; public final static String UNICODE0363 = "sliding articulation"; public final static String UNICODE = "egressive airflow";
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • IPACodes

      public IPACodes()

  • Method Details

    • isIPA

      public static boolean isIPA(int i)
      Checks if the given character code corresponds to an IPA symbol defined in this class.
      Parameters:
      i - the character code (Unicode)
      Returns:
      true if it is a defined IPA code
